assignment.description: Indicates the account level to which the terminal is assigned, the [assignment status](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/automating-terminal-management/assign-terminals-api), and where the terminals is in the process of being reassigned to.

connectivity.description: Information about bluetooth, cellular, ethernet and wifi connectivity for the terminal.

firmwareVersion.description: The software release currently in use on the terminal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the terminal.

lastActivityAt.description: Date and time of the last activity on the terminal. Not included when the last activity was more than 14 days ago.

lastTransactionAt.description: Date and time of the last transaction on the terminal. Not included when the last transaction was more than 14 days ago.

model.description: The model name of the terminal.

serialNumber.description: The serial number of the terminal.
